title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: the easiest way to get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Ollama; chat, generate, pull, list, delete models from Node or the browser.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; simple chat & generate helpers, streaming support, PyPI package.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama; drop-in LLM, embeddings, and tool-calling wrappers.

title: ollama-webui (formerly ollama-web)
summary: ChatGPT-style web UI for Ollama; markdown, code highlighting, model management, multi-user, Docker ready.

title: ollama4j
summary: Java/Kotlin client for Ollama; fluent API, streaming, Maven Central.

title: ollama-rb
summary: Ruby gem for Ollama; chat, generate, pull, list, delete, with streaming support.

title: ollama-cli (community)
summary: Interactive TUI for Ollama written in Go; browse, chat, manage models from the terminal.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: VS-Code extension bringing local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot-style inline suggestions.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: .NET client for Ollama; NuGet package with chat, generate, embeddings, and streaming.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration for Ollama; generator & embedder nodes for retrieval-augmented generation pipelines.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama + Chroma + LangChain; ingest PDFs and chat locally.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Discord bot that chats with local Ollama models; slash commands, streaming replies, Docker image.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU support and PVC model cache.

title: ollama-tools
summary: Collection of ready-to-use function-calling tools (weather, GitHub, shell, etc.) for Ollama chat.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix flake for reproducible Ollama builds and model caches; supports CUDA & Apple Silicon.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Rust crate for Ollama; async client with chat, generate, pull, list, delete, and streaming.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin to summarize notes, brainstorm ideas, and answer questions using local Ollama models.
